text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oooh! I'm raring to go! I wanna run already!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
After all, breakfast today was carrot rice, I had a
dream that the carrot princess said I'd win, and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I've been training so hard with you! I can't lose!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You can bet on me! Okay! Here I gooo!
